d1_emptied_before.text: Grandpa always said: start with what the room told everyone and nobody heard. The whole district saw that vault. What else did the vault show them?
Grandpa always said: locks are witnesses too. Ida's lock had fifty years to learn how to complain, and tonight it didn't.
The lock, Gibbons. Fifty years of Ida's care, and tonight — not one complaint. Sit with what that means.

d3_theft_window.text: Grandpa always said: when a story feels too big, find the witness who counted. Somebody in this town counts everything.
The checklist, Gibbons. Laminated, time-stamped, three nights early. Read what it proves — not about her. About the calendar.

poppy_opened_not_emptied.text: Grandpa always said: re-read the witness who was most embarrassed. Embarrassment and guilt wear different coats.
The backwards key. A thief wipes her tracks; a worrier makes a list of them. Which kind hung that key back wrong?
